# weather.weather_client.WeatherClient { #spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherClient }

```python
weather.weather_client.WeatherClient(latitude, longitude)
```

Client for fetching weather data from Open-Meteo API.
Handles the low-level API interactions, parameter building, and response parsing.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type             | Description                | Default    |
|-----------|------------------|----------------------------|------------|
| latitude  | [float](`float`) | Latitude of the location.  | _required_ |
| longitude | [float](`float`) | Longitude of the location. | _required_ |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [fetch_archive](#spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherClient.fetch_archive) | Fetch historical data from Archive API. |
| [fetch_forecast](#spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherClient.fetch_forecast) | Fetch forecast data from Forecast API. |

### fetch_archive { #spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherClient.fetch_archive }

```python
weather.weather_client.WeatherClient.fetch_archive(start, end, timezone='UTC')
```

Fetch historical data from Archive API.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name     | Type                                           | Description                            | Default    |
|----------|------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------|------------|
| start    | [pd](`pandas`).[Timestamp](`pandas.Timestamp`) | Start date for the historical data.    | _required_ |
| end      | [pd](`pandas`).[Timestamp](`pandas.Timestamp`) | End date for the historical data.      | _required_ |
| timezone | [str](`str`)                                   | Timezone for the data (default "UTC"). | `'UTC'`    |

### fetch_forecast { #spotforecast2_safe.weather.weather_client.WeatherClient.fetch_forecast }

```python
weather.weather_client.WeatherClient.fetch_forecast(days_ahead, timezone='UTC')
```

Fetch forecast data from Forecast API.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type         | Description                            | Default    |
|------------|--------------|----------------------------------------|------------|
| days_ahead | [int](`int`) | Number of days ahead for the forecast. | _required_ |
| timezone   | [str](`str`) | Timezone for the data (default "UTC"). | `'UTC'`    |
